title: integration_get_full_json: weak oracle (is_object only, no value check)
description:
What is unclear and for whom: integration_get_full_json (line 362) writes {alpha: 'aaa'} via a field-put, then reads back without ?field= and only asserts json.is_object(). Any valid JSON object passes, including an empty one. A contributor who broke the data fidelity but not the shape would not be caught.

What would make it clear: assert json['alpha'] == 'aaa' to verify the actual written value is recoverable. Same pattern as integration_put_full_json_and_get uses (checks specific field value).
